title: Minimum Difficulty of a Job Schedule
hints: If the number of jobs is less than the number of days, it is impossible to assign at least one job per day. What should you return in that case?
This problem has optimal substructure: the minimum difficulty for the first k jobs over i days depends on how you split them. Consider dynamic programming.
Define a state representing the minimum difficulty to schedule the first i jobs in exactly j days. The base case is 0 jobs in 0 days having 0 difficulty.
